dns_server.title: DNS Server Configuration
dns_server.description:
Enter the IP address of the DNS server to use for hostname resolution.
Default: {default_dns}

another.title: Add Another Target
another.description: Do you want to add another target? Currently configured: {target_count}

interval.title: Update Interval
interval.description: How often to check targets (in seconds)

user.title: Add Device
user.description: Choose the type of device to add

network.title: Add Network Device
network.description: Configure a network device to monitor

zha_device.title: Add ZigBee Device (ZHA)
zha_device.description: Select a ZigBee device discovered by ZHA to monitor

zha_configure.title: Configure ZigBee Device
zha_configure.description: Set a friendly name and inactivity timeout for **{device_name}** ({ieee})

error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please check Home Assistant logs.
error.no_zha_devices: No ZigBee devices found. Make sure ZHA is configured and has discovered devices.
error.all_zha_devices_added: All discovered ZigBee devices are already being monitored.

menu.title: Connectivity Monitor
menu.description: Choose a device category to configure

network_menu.title: Network Device
network_menu.description: Choose an action for your network device

zha_menu.title: ZigBee (ZHA) Device
zha_menu.description: Choose an action for your ZigBee device

device_select.title: Select Device
device_select.description: Choose which device to modify alert settings for

alert_config.title: Alert Configuration
alert_config.description: Configure alert settings for the selected device

remove_device.title: Remove Device
remove_device.description: Choose device to remove. All sensors for this device will be removed.

rename_host.title: Change Host Address / Device Name
rename_host.description: Enter the new host IP or FQDN for this device

remove_zha_device.title: Remove ZigBee Device (ZHA)
remove_zha_device.description: Select the ZigBee device to stop monitoring

zha_alert_select.title: Modify ZigBee Alert Settings
zha_alert_select.description: Select the ZigBee device to configure alerts for

zha_alert_config.title: ZigBee Alert Configuration
zha_alert_config.description: Configure alert settings for the selected ZigBee device

zha_select_for_timeout.title: Change ZigBee Inactivity Timeout
zha_select_for_timeout.description: Select the ZigBee device to update

zha_update_timeout.title: Update Inactivity Timeout
zha_update_timeout.description: A device is considered Inactive when it has not been seen within the configured timeout

error.no_notify_groups: No notification groups found. Please set up notification groups in Home Assistant first.
error.no_zha_devices: No ZigBee devices found. Make sure ZHA is configured and has discovered devices.
error.all_zha_devices_added: All discovered ZigBee devices are already being monitored.
